News

New Zealand Berry Industry

By Global Plant Genetics • 23 January 2018

Having recently spent some time exploring the future of the New Zealand berry industry, I come away not in the least bit surprised that it has seen considerable expansion in recent years. But like most other countries there is still more to come.

Share: Twitter LinkedIn
